nasb.text: He has done mighty deeds with His arm; He has scattered those who were proud in the thoughts of their heart.

esv.text: He has shown strength with his arm; he has scattered the proud in the thoughts of their hearts;

cnv.text: 他用膀臂施展大能， 驅散心裡妄想的狂傲人。

ccb.text: 祂伸出臂膀，施展大能， 驱散心骄气傲的人。

csbs.text: 他用膀臂施展大能， 驱散那些心思意念骄傲的人。
